resources.string: • Slotted design: Player interface is divided into composable areas\n• Flexible customization: Top bar, bottom bar and other slots support full customization\n• Fine-grained control: Hide specific UI elements within default slots on demand
All elements displayed normally, all gestures enabled.\n\nThis is the default player UI with complete top bar, bottom bar, settings menu, and gesture interactions.

Hidden UI elements:
• Top bar: Download button, Snapshot button
• Bottom bar: Progress bar

Use hiddenSlotElements declarative configuration to precisely hide unwanted UI elements while keeping others intact.

Disabled gestures:
• Double tap (toggle play state)
• Left vertical drag (adjust brightness)
• Right vertical drag (adjust volume)

Configure the gesture control slot via hiddenSlotElements to precisely disable specific gesture interactions.

Hidden UI elements:
• Top bar: Download button, Snapshot button
• Bottom bar: Progress bar
• Settings menu: Speed, Mute

Disabled gestures:
• Double tap, Left vertical drag, Right vertical drag

Comprehensive demonstration of fine-grained control, managing both UI elements and gesture interactions simultaneously.
